en: I wanted to tell you one story. This is the story of the best meal I've ever had in my life, okay?
ko: 하나 얘기해 줄게. 내 인생 최고의 식사 이야기야.
ja: 一つ話を聞いてほしい。人生で最高の食事の話だ
zhTW: 我想告訴你一個故事。這是我人生中最棒的一頓飯的故事，好嗎？
vi: Toi muon ke cho ban mot cau chuyen. Day la cau chuyen ve bua an ngon nhat doi toi

en: Happened when I was 11 years old in Chicago, Illinois, where I grew up. I went to a place called the Salt and Pepper Diner with my best friend, John.
ko: 11살 때 시카고에서 친구 존이랑 솔트 앤 페퍼 다이너에 갔어.
ja: 11歳の時、シカゴのソルト＆ペッパー・ダイナーで親友のジョンと
zhTW: 發生在我11歲的時候，在我長大的伊利諾州芝加哥。我和最好的朋友約翰去了一個叫鹽和胡椒餐廳的地方
vi: Xay ra khi toi 11 tuoi o Chicago, noi toi lon len. Toi va ban than John den quan Salt and Pepper Diner

en: We walk in to the diner one day, and they had a jukebox there, okay? And the jukebox was three plays for a dollar.
ja: ある日入ったら、ジュークボックスがあって、1ドルで3曲
zhTW: 有一天我們走進餐廳，那裡有台點唱機，好嗎？點唱機一美元可以放三首歌
vi: Mot ngay chung toi buoc vao, co may hat tu dong, mot do la ba bai

en: So we put in $7 and selected 21 plays of Tom Jones's What's New, Pussycat?
ko: 7달러를 넣고 톰 존스의 "왓츠 뉴, 푸시캣?"을 21번 선택했어.
ja: 7ドル入れてトム・ジョーンズの「ワッツ・ニュー・プッシーキャット？」を21回選んだ
zhTW: 所以我們投了七美元，選了21次湯姆乙瓊斯的《What's New, Pussycat?》
vi: Nen chung toi bo 7 do va chon 21 lan bai What's New, Pussycat? cua Tom Jones

en: And then we ordered and waited.
vi: Roi chung toi goi mon va doi

en: Here's the thing about when What's New, Pussycat? plays over and over and over and over and over again.
ko: "왓츠 뉴, 푸시캣?"이 계속 반복되면 이런 일이 생겨.
ja: ワッツ・ニュー・プッシーキャット？が何度も何度もかかると
zhTW: 關於《What's New, Pussycat?》一遍又一遍又一遍又一遍又一遍地播放這件事
vi: Dieu ve viec What's New, Pussycat? chay di chay lai nhieu lan

en: The second time it plays, your immediate thought is not, hey, someone's playing What's New, Pussycat again.
ko: 두 번째 나올 때, "누가 또 틀었네"가 아니라
ja: 2回目に流れた時、まず「また流れてる」とは思わない
zhTW: 第二次播放時，你的直覺反應不是，嘿，有人又在放《What's New, Pussycat?》了
vi: Lan thu hai chay, y nghi dau tien khong phai la, ai do dang mo lai What's New, Pussycat

en: It's, hey, What's New, Pussycat is a lot longer than I first...
ja: 「ワッツ・ニュー・プッシーキャット？って思ったより長いな」と思う
zhTW: 而是，嘿，《What's New, Pussycat?》比我一開始以為的要長很多...
vi: Ma la, nay, What's New, Pussycat dai hon toi tuong...
